action.reasoning: Observation: ResNet50 finished 15 epochs with best noisy val_acc 0.5292. predict.py already auto-loads any existing checkpoints from a 3-model ensemble list and applies TenCrop TTA. Analysis: With only ~38 minutes left, long training is impossible. The fastest path to a higher score is to test whether adding the architecturally-diverse ResNet50 improves the existing 74.53% two-model ConvNeXt ensemble. Decision: Submit evaluation immediately using the current predict.py pipeline; it will automatically ensemble all three available checkpoints (raw ConvNeXt, cleaned ConvNeXt, ResNet50) with TenCrop TTA.
